fields.title: Fix Theme type mismatch in exa/index.ts
fields.description: exa/index.ts defines a local Theme interface (line 538) with fg/bold/dim methods. The renderCall/renderResult callbacks receive pi's Theme type, causing 6 identical 'as unknown as Theme' casts. The local interface is a subset of pi's Theme - the cast works at runtime but masks compile-time type changes.
fields.design: Determine if pi's Theme type exports fg/bold/dim. If yes, import pi's Theme directly and delete the local interface. If pi's Theme has a different shape, create a single adapter function that maps pi's Theme to the local subset, called once per render function instead of casting 6 times.
fields.acceptance_criteria: No 'as unknown as Theme' casts in exa/index.ts. Theme type flows cleanly from pi's callback into render functions. npm run gate passes.
fields.notes: Verified pi Theme type in @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent (Theme class exposes fg(color: ThemeColor, text) and bold(text); no dim() method). Updated extensions/tau/src/exa/index.ts to import Theme from pi-coding-agent, removed local Theme interface, and removed all 6 'as unknown as Theme' casts in render callbacks. Ran 'cd extensions/tau && npm run gate' (typecheck/lint/test passed; lint has pre-existing warnings only).
